heading: Establishment of committees to assist in research and service programs
label: 1629 Establishment of committees to assist in research and service programs
text: In the furtherance of the research and service work authorized by this Act, the Secretary of Agriculture may, in addition to the national advisory committee, establish appropriate committees, including representatives of producers, industry, government and science, to assist in effectuating specific research and service programs.
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , which enacted this chapter and sections 427h, 427j, and 3105 of this title and amended .
